name: AutocompleteLocation
description: A location that can be used to plot on a map.

locationType.description: Type of location, eg. address or postalcode

city.description: City name of the location, usually used for display purposes when sourcing weather data.

adminCode.description: The admin code for the location.

postalCode.description: Postal Code of the location, usually used for display purposes when sourcing weather data.

position.description: City name of the location, usually used for display purposes when sourcing weather data.

name.description: Editable name of the location to display to the user.

longName.description: Longer name of the location to display to the user, typically the full address.
longName.example: Buckingham Palace, Westminster, London, Greater London GBR

id.description: Unique Id created for favorite and recent locations

locationKey.description: AccuWeather Surefind location key for this location.

name.description: Simple name for a location, such as the name of a city

longName.description: Full name for a location, such as the name of an Admin or address
longName.example: 385 Science Park Rd, State College, PA

displayName.description:
Name used to display to the user as the placeholder
This differece from the LongName since will be sometimes display location name from
the AW API (Non-english/direct location key serach)
displayName.example: 385 Science Park Rd, State College, PA or Eureka, CA USA

stationCode.description: AccuWeather station code for this location.

supportedDataSets.description: AccuWeather list of supported data sets for this location.

supportsMinuteCast.description: True if a location supports MinuteCast data.

supportsEventConfidence.description: True if a location supports probabilities on weather events.

locationSettingsInfo.description: Detailed keys for the location from AccuWeather to aid in weather data retrieval.

source.description: The parent provider of the location.
